message:
fix(ensemble): Improve mode catalog API and add modes command

- Change AllModes() to ListModes() returning value types not pointers
- Add GetModeByCode() lookup to GetModeCard() for flexible mode references
- Register newModesCmd() in root command
- Add mode_card tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2410,6 +2410,7 @@ func init() {
 		newMetricsCmd(),
 		newWorkCmd(),
 		newEnsembleCmd(),
+		newModesCmd(),
 
 		// Internal commands
 		newMonitorCmd(),
